top_signals.title: Indian Rupee Rebound Bets Vanish as Soaring Crude Blunts Inflows
top_signals.summary: With oil prices on the ascent again, bets that tens of billions of dollars in fresh capital inflows would sustain a recovery in the Indian rupee have all but vanished.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Thai Bonds Are Beating Asia and Analysts Predict Further Gains
top_signals.summary: Thailand’s bonds have beaten their emerging Asian peers over the past month and analysts predict they will extend gains on favorable supply dynamics and slower inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Bessent says U.S. could sanction China over AI model 'theft'
top_signals.summary: Chinese open-weight models are gaining steam against leading offerings from American companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
